languages.text: Электрические всполохи, словно гнев самого Бога-Императора, пронизали воздух, ограждая людей от несущих смерть ксеносов. Один за одним, служители Омниссии падали, истекая кровью и машинным елеем, до последних мгновений провозглашая бинарные литании, исполненные праведной ненависти. Их гибель даровала нам драгоценные секунды, и этого времени оказалось достаточно, чтобы добраться до платформ, взлетающих ввысь.
languages.translation_comment: Успешный чек Техники. Больше уцелевших зарковчан у Себериана в следующей сцене. Архимилитант жив.
Успешный чек Техники. Больше уцелевших зарковчан у Себериана в следующей сцене. Архимилитант жив.

languages.text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic litanies filled with righteous anger until their last moments. Their deaths granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.
languages.original_text: Электрические всполохи, словно гнев самого Бога-Императора, пронизали воздух, ограждая людей от несущих смерть ксеносов. Один за одним, служители Омниссии падали, истекая кровью и машинным елеем, до последних мгновений провозглашая бинарные литании, исполненные праведной ненависти. Их гибель даровала нам драгоценные секунды, и этого времени оказалось достаточно, чтобы добраться до платформ, взлетающих ввысь.

traits.locale_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic litanies filled with righteous anger until their last moments. Their deaths granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.

Electric flashes of the Omnissiah's blessed wrath pierced the air, shielding people from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Machine God fell down, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic Litanies of Depulsion until their last moments. Their death granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.

Electric flashes of the Omnissiah's blessed wrath pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Machine God fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic Litanies of Depulsion until their last moments. Their deaths granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.

Electric flashes of the Omnissiah's blessed wrath pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Machine God fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic Litanies of Depulsion until their last moments. Their deaths granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.

Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic litanies filled with righteous anger until their last moments. Their deaths granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.

languages.text: Los destellos eléctricos, similares a la cólera del propio Dios Emperador, atravesaron el aire, protegiendo a los humanos de la muerte que traían los xenos. Uno tras otro, los sirvientes del Omnissiah cayeron, derramando su sangre y ungüentos sagrados, recitando las letanías binarias con furia justiciera hasta el último momento. Sus muertes nos dieron los escasos segundos que necesitábamos para llegar a las plataformas voladoras.
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic litanies filled with righteous anger until their last moments. Their deaths granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.

traits.locale_text: Los destellos eléctricos, similares a la cólera del propio Dios Emperador, atravesaron el aire, protegiendo a los humanos de la muerte que traían los xenos. Uno tras otro, los sirvientes del Omnissiah cayeron, derramando su sangre y ungüentos sagrados, recitando las letanías binarias con furia justiciera hasta el último momento. Sus muertes nos dieron los escasos segundos que necesitábamos para llegar a las plataformas voladoras.

languages.text: Des éclairs électriques, semblables à la fureur de l'Empereur-Dieu Lui-même, fendirent l'air, protégeant les humains contre les xénos. Les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie tombèrent les uns après les autres, couvrant le sol de leur sang et d'onguents sacrés, et récitant jusqu'à leur dernier souffle les litanies binhaires débordant de rage vertueuse. Leur mort nous permit de gagner les précieuses secondes dont nous avions besoin pour atteindre les plateformes surélevées.
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic litanies filled with righteous anger until their last moments. Their deaths granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.

traits.locale_text: Des éclairs électriques, semblables à la fureur de l'Empereur-Dieu Lui-même, fendirent l'air, protégeant les humains contre les xénos. Les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie tombèrent les uns après les autres, couvrant le sol de leur sang et d'onguents sacrés, et récitant jusqu'à leur dernier souffle les litanies binhaires débordant de rage vertueuse. Leur mort nous permit de gagner les précieuses secondes dont nous avions besoin pour atteindre les plateformes surélevées.

languages.text: 电光迸射，犹如神皇本尊之盛怒撕裂长空，保护人类免遭告死异形的毒手。欧姆尼赛亚的仆从接二连三地倒下，鲜血与神圣机油四处飞溅。直到生命最后一刻，他们仍在正义的怒火中吟诵二进制祷文。他们的牺牲，为我们抵达上升浮台赢得了宝贵时间。
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic litanies filled with righteous anger until their last moments. Their deaths granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.

traits.locale_text: 电光迸射，犹如神皇本尊之盛怒撕裂长空，保护人类免遭告死异形的毒手。欧姆尼赛亚的仆从接二连三地倒下，鲜血与神圣机油四处飞溅。直到生命最后一刻，他们仍在正义的怒火中吟诵二进制祷文。他们的牺牲，为我们抵达上升浮台赢得了宝贵时间。

languages.text: Elektrische Blitze zuckten wie die Wut des Gottimperators Selbst durch die Luft und schützten die Menschen vor den todbringenden Xenos. Einer nach dem anderen fielen die Diener des Omnissiah, vergossen Blut und heilige Substanz und stimmten bis zuletzt von rechtschaffenem Zorn erfüllte binhärische Litaneien an. Ihr Tod verschaffte uns die kostbaren Sekunden, die wir brauchten, um die aufsteigenden Plattformen zu erreichen.
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic litanies filled with righteous anger until their last moments. Their deaths granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.

Einer nach dem anderen fielen die Diener des Omnissiah, vergossen Blut und heilige Substanz und stimmten bis zuletzt von rechtschaffenem Zorn erfüllte binhärische Litaneien an. Ihr Tod verschaffte uns die kostbaren Sekunden, die wir brauchten, um die aufsteigenden Plattformen zu erreichen.

languages.text: Tanrı İmparator Hazretleri'nin gazabını andıran elektrik çakımları, havayı delip geçerek insanları ölüm getiren zenolardan korudu. Hermesih'in hizmetkârları, kan ve kutsal özyağ dökerek son anlarına kadar ikilidilde öfke dolu ilahiler okuyup birbiri ardına düştü. Ölümleri, yükselen platformlara ulaşmak için gereken değerli saniyeleri bize kazandırdı.
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic litanies filled with righteous anger until their last moments. Hermesih'in hizmetkârları, kan ve kutsal özyağ dökerek son anlarına kadar ikilidilde öfke dolu ilahiler okuyup birbiri ardına düştü. Ölümleri, yükselen platformlara ulaşmak için gereken değerli saniyeleri bize kazandırdı.

languages.text: 神帝の怒りのごとく、電撃が空を裂き、人間を死をもたらす異種族から守った。オムニシアのしもべたちは次々と倒れ、血と聖なる油を流し、正義に満ちた怒りのビナリックの祈祷文を最後の瞬間まで唱えた。彼らの死は、我々が高々とそびえるプラットフォームにたどり着くために必要な貴重な秒数を与えてくれた。
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, and reciting binharic litanies filled with righteous anger until their last moments. Their deaths granted us the precious seconds we needed to reach the soaring platforms.
